temporal_description:
(00:00-00:02) A man with a menacing expression, wearing a dark red robe, violently smashes through a white paneled door. The door splinters and breaks apart as he pushes his way through, his face contorted in a snarl. (Storyline: This opening shot immediately establishes a violent and aggressive tone, introducing a character who is breaking into a location with force and intent.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: Loud, sharp sounds of wood splintering and crashing as the door is broken down.)
(00:03-00:05) A woman with dark hair, wearing a plaid shirt, screams in terror as she is violently thrown backward through the doorway. She crashes onto a bed in a dimly lit bedroom, landing near a bedside lamp. (Storyline: The woman is revealed to be the victim of the man's break-in. Her terrified reaction and violent entry into the room heighten the sense of immediate danger.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A woman's high-pitched scream is heard, followed by the thud of her body hitting the bed.)
